title: Bare Bones Better Redstone
description: A Resource pack for the Barebones resource pack to enhance the Redstone side of the pack, such as directional hoppers, directional dispenser and dropper, and also directional observer
body:
**Bare Bones Better Redstone** is an addon of Bare Bone Texture pack with the purpose of enhancing the redstone side of the pack.

# HOW TO USE
Use it with Bare Bones Texture pack - [Bare Bones by RobotPants](https://modrinth.com/project/rox3U8B6)
**Make sure this pack is on top of the original Bare Bones texture pack**
![Texturepack GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f7a37f1c97c6086122c20bee2a2d33408531ebc_0.webp)

## This Pack Adds
**1. Directional Hoppers**![Before and after for Hoppers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d94273e33d294a25537addcd17c1ef6981eef542.png)![Before and after for Hoppers V2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e10c593d0a2761c74ec5b4a5e6812e4babbc0d5e_0.webp)

**2. Directional Dispenser** 
![Before and after for Dispenser](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb1775367cc4071393bf8e9f8931754a622c3c72.png)
![Before and after for Dispenser V2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e18e36a0ca8ad85466cdb170e280b71a7ce0787d.png)

**3. Directional Dropper**
![Before and after for Dropper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c517e734583db2ef4a2b4bcfa5a3fb710ff3a097.png)
![Before and after for Dropper V2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0866578f9b0ffdc8a215d2d5834ab3e675fe0f5.png)

**4. Better Observer**
![Before and after for observer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e102eeb1f8af4156d6b530b4b9b6be5653a8230c.png)
